title: Astronaut Silhouette Universe Poster AI
sourceTitle: Astronaut Silhouette Universe Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end Japanese fashion magazine cover illustration of slender adult Japanese fashion model with short black bob and aloof gaze, built around structured white sleeveless coat, cobalt blue wide trousers, and coral-red belt accent, quiet standing pose with one shoulder slightly raised and eyes looking past camera, and silver-grey earrings and pale yellow clutch. Subject: slender adult Japanese fashion model with short black bob and aloof gaze is the slender adult editorial figure, simplified into crisp modern fashion-art shapes with quiet aloof presence and precise silhouette. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed minimalist fashion cover composition: single centered or slightly low-cropped figure, large blue negative space, simplified precise body form, quiet posture, and strong sunlight shaping the silhouette from upper left. Signature Elements: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Fixed blue-white base palette with small coral red, misty purple, pale yellow, ash pink, sage green, and silver-grey accents; cohesive, refined, high-key, and never busy. Lighting: Strong sunlight from upper left, near-overexposed white zones, hard-edged cool-blue and blue-purple shadow planes, and clean graphic contrast without heavy painting. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Flat color blocks, refined cel-shaded fabric planes, crisp edge transitions, translucent cool highlights, and simplified but accurate garment geometry. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
